resolved_primary_target: clear water bottle, green soda can

visual_analysis.description: A green Sprite can on the left side of the shelf.
A red Coca-Cola can in the center of the shelf, in front of the water bottle.
A clear plastic water bottle behind the red soda can.
A brown paper bag in the background behind the objects.

action_plan.explanation: Picking the Sprite can, which is one of the requested items and is unobstructed.
Removing the red soda can which is blocking access to the water bottle.
Picking the water bottle, the second requested item, which is now accessible.
